Class FreedomKeys

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.FreedomKeys
public class FreedomKeys extends Object
holder for keys across the plugin

      used to enable / disable sprite (no longer used)
      Returns:
      boolean of if sprite is active
